form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign won by head this track November 12 over 1500m defeating Pado with 56kg at $1.70. Previously first up; third of 12 at this track October 2 over 1500m, 7 len behind Ultimatum with 56kg at $1.40. Expected to play a major role.
